---
name: Q&A Question
about: Ask a question against the knowledge base
title: "Q&A: "
labels: qa
---

Read WIKI_RULES.md, DELEGATION_SPEC.md, QUALITY_EXAMPLES.md, and wiki/index.md.

Answer this question by reading whatever wiki files you need:

**[Type your question here]**

Write your answer as a new markdown file in outputs/ with a descriptive filename. Include [[wikilinks]] to the wiki articles you drew from. Frame through the Microsoft/GitHub partnership lens. End with a concrete recommendation if the question touches on strategy.

Include at the end: Sources used, Gaps, Confidence notes.

SELF-REVIEW before committing: (1) No claims that something "doesn't exist" without checking Microsoft's portfolio. (2) Recommendations name specific partners/actions, not open questions. (3) Quantitative claims are sourced from wiki, not generated.
